use_cases: Interactive feature cards with 3D hover effects for SaaS landing pages
Icon-based showcase sections with smooth transform animations on hover
Engaging call-to-action cards with spring-based hover state transitions
Product feature highlights with dimensional hover interactions
Interactive library or collection cards with 3D visual feedback
ai_summary: A 3D hover icon card component built with Framer Motion that displays an icon with heading and text content. Features smooth spring-based transitions and transform animations on mouse interactions, creating a dimensional hover experience. Ideal for feature showcases, library sections, and interactive card grids in modern web applications.
